title: Authors and Citation

title: Authors and Citation
text: Tang T (2026). deckroadmap: Roadmap Footers Reveal.js Slides Quarto R Markdown. R package version 0.1.1, https://github.com/CodingTigerTang/deckroadmap.
code: @Manual{,   title = {deckroadmap: Roadmap Footers for Reveal.js Slides in Quarto and R Markdown},   author = {Tiger Tang},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.1.1},   url = {https://github.com/CodingTigerTang/deckroadmap}, }

title: deckroadmap
text: deckroadmap adds PowerPoint-style roadmap footers Quarto R Markdown Reveal.js slides. helps audiences see covered, section currently , comes next. package supports multiple built-styles, including pill, minimal, progress, along options colors, size, positioning.

title: deckroadmap
text: remotes:

title: deckroadmap
text: Many business, teaching, conference presentations use roadmap bar help orient audience talk. deckroadmap brings pattern Reveal.js slides simple R-friendly way. one function call, can add persistent footer marks: completed sections current section upcoming sections

title: deckroadmap
text: deckroadmap currently supports: Quarto Revealjs presentations R Markdown Revealjs presentations designed Reveal.js-based HTML slides.

title: deckroadmap
text: Add use_roadmap() near top document, tag slide section name using data-roadmap. use matching section labels slides, example:
code: library(deckroadmap)  use_roadmap(   c("Intro", "Problem", "Analysis", "Recommendation", "Next Steps"),   style = "pill" ) ## Welcome {data-roadmap="Intro"}  ## The problem {data-roadmap="Problem"}  ## Analysis overview {data-roadmap="Analysis"}  ## Recommendation {data-roadmap="Recommendation"}  ## Next steps {data-roadmap="Next Steps"}

title: deckroadmap
text: Full working examples included examples/ folder: examples/quarto-demo.qmd examples/rmarkdown-demo.Rmd show complete Reveal.js slide documents Quarto R Markdown.

title: deckroadmap
text: can preview roadmap style locally rendering slides using preview_roadmap(). README renders GitHub Markdown, live HTML preview shown . screenshots generated locally preview function.
code: preview_roadmap(   sections = c("Intro", "Problem", "Analysis", "Recommendation", "Next Steps"),   current = "Analysis",   style = "progress" )

title: deckroadmap
text: deckroadmap currently includes three styles.

title: deckroadmap
text: rounded floating footer soft background.

title: deckroadmap
text: lighter text-roadmap less visual weight.

title: deckroadmap
text: connected progress-style roadmap section blocks.

title: deckroadmap
text: can control font size, bottom spacing, text colors, , progress, background colors.

title: deckroadmap
code: use_roadmap(   c("Intro", "Problem", "Analysis", "Recommendation", "Next Steps"),   style = "pill",   font_size = "14px",   bottom = "12px",   active_color = "#2563eb",   done_color = "#374151",   todo_color = "#9ca3af" )

title: deckroadmap
code: use_roadmap(   c("Intro", "Problem", "Analysis", "Recommendation", "Next Steps"),   style = "progress",   active_color = "#ffffff",   done_color = "#ffffff",   todo_color = "#334155",   active_bg_color = "#2563eb",   done_bg_color = "#475569",   todo_bg_color = "#e2e8f0" )

what: Preview a roadmap footer style — preview_roadmap
title: Preview a roadmap footer style — preview_roadmap
text: Preview roadmap footer style

title: Preview a roadmap footer style — preview_roadmap
code: preview_roadmap(   sections,   current = sections[1],   style = c("pill", "minimal", "progress"),   font_size = "16px",   bottom = "16px",   active_color = NULL,   done_color = NULL,   todo_color = NULL,   active_bg_color = NULL,   done_bg_color = NULL,   todo_bg_color = NULL )

title: Preview a roadmap footer style — preview_roadmap
text: sections Character vector section names order. current current section name highlight. style Roadmap style. One "pill", "minimal", "progress". font_size CSS font size roadmap footer. bottom CSS bottom offset roadmap footer. active_color CSS text color active section. done_color CSS text color completed sections. todo_color CSS text color upcoming sections. active_bg_color CSS background color active section progress style. done_bg_color CSS background color completed sections progress style. todo_bg_color CSS background color upcoming sections progress style.

title: Preview a roadmap footer style — preview_roadmap
text: browsable HTML preview.

what: Add a roadmap footer to Reveal.js slides — use_roadmap
title: Add a roadmap footer to Reveal.js slides — use_roadmap
text: Add roadmap footer Reveal.js slides

title: Add a roadmap footer to Reveal.js slides — use_roadmap
code: use_roadmap(   sections,   id = "roadmap-config",   style = c("pill", "minimal", "progress"),   font_size = "16px",   bottom = "16px",   active_color = NULL,   done_color = NULL,   todo_color = NULL,   active_bg_color = NULL,   done_bg_color = NULL,   todo_bg_color = NULL )

title: Add a roadmap footer to Reveal.js slides — use_roadmap
text: sections Character vector section names order. id HTML id hidden config node. style Roadmap style. One "pill", "minimal", "progress". font_size CSS font size roadmap footer. bottom CSS bottom offset roadmap footer. active_color CSS text color active section. done_color CSS text color completed sections. todo_color CSS text color upcoming sections. active_bg_color CSS background color active section progress style. done_bg_color CSS background color completed sections progress style. todo_bg_color CSS background color upcoming sections progress style.

title: Add a roadmap footer to Reveal.js slides — use_roadmap
